title: OpenTeams Loadout Definition
description: Schema for loadouts/<name>.yaml — a reusable bundle of skills, capabilities, MCP servers, permissions, and prompt material that can be bound to a role or an individual agent. Supports single inheritance via `extends`.

name.description: Loadout name. Must match the filename (loadouts/<name>.yaml). Referenced by roles via the `loadout` field.

extends.description: Parent loadout to inherit from. Inheritance applies the canonical merge rules (union for capabilities/mcp_servers/permissions.allow/ask; deny-wins for permissions.deny; replace-if-set for skills.profile and skills.max_tokens; concatenate for prompt_addendum).

description.description: Human-readable description of the loadout's purpose.
examples: Deep security review loadout with OWASP focus.

skills.description: Skill selection for skill-tree or compatible skill systems.

oneOf.description: Flat list — replaces any inherited capabilities entirely.

capabilities.description: Capabilities for this loadout. Same shape as RoleDefinition.capabilities.

capabilities_add.description: Flat-field composition: capabilities to add on top of the parent loadout.

capabilities_remove.description: Flat-field composition: capabilities to remove from the parent loadout.

mcp_servers.description: MCP server entries — either inline (name + command + args + env) or symbolic refs resolved by the consuming system.

permissions.description: Agent-system-agnostic permission lists. Deny always wins across inheritance.

prompt_addendum.description: Markdown appended after the role's primary prompt. During inheritance, parent and child addenda are concatenated with a blank line.

additionalProperties.description: Extension namespaces for consuming systems (e.g. macro_agent, claude_code, gemini). Stored but not interpreted by openteams.

profile.description: Named profile from the skill system.

exclude.description: Skill slugs to exclude even if matched by profile/include.

max_tokens.description: Optional token budget hint for the compiled skill bundle.

deny.description: Refused. Cannot be removed by child loadouts.

ask.description: Requires user confirmation at invocation time.

ref.description: Symbolic reference resolved by the consuming system.

config.description: Opaque config passed through to the resolved server.
